name: No-Bake Lemon Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1 cup cornflakes or graham cracker crumbs
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the cornflakes, sugar, and cinnamon. Add the melted margarine and blend.
2. Set aside 2 tablespoons of this mixture.
3. Line the bottom of a 9-inch pan with the crumb mixture. Refrigerate.
4. Beat the cream cheese until fluffy. Blend in the sweetened condensed milk, lemon juice, and vanilla.
5. Pour the mixture into the chilled crust.
6. Sprinkle the remaining crumb mixture on top. Refrigerate for at least 3 hours before serving.
7. This recipe can be doubled and baked in a 9x13-inch pan if desired.
(Note: The sweetened condensed milk is made by blending together cream cheese, lemon juice, and vanilla.)
